title: Novelty Cute 2.4Ghz Wireless Mouse Cartoon Animal Panda Shaped Rechargeable Optical Mini Small Mice for PC Laptop Computer
description:
30 days money-back and 12-months guaranty,
when you are not satisfied with our product or you have any question, please contact us to get a after-sale service, we will give you a satisfied response within 12 hours.
How to use：
It came with a USB cord that you use to connect it to a laptop or charger box for charging,  Then popped the USB connector into a USB port, pay attention the receiver contact with USB interface whether are in good condition, then wait for 5 seconds around to normal work
How long one need to charge the unit:
Its standard charge takes 4 hours, the longest charge time is less than or equal to 8 hours.The average charge every three days
Feature:
This mouse design is very cute, cute panda cartoon. Adorable and cute panda wireless mouse,with mouse-button eyes and a scrolling nose,great for a panda lover or kids. 1600DPI resolution optical tracking technology provides more sensitivity than standard optical mice for smooth and precise tracking on a wide range of surfaces. 2.4GHz wireless provides a powerful, reliable connection. It stays charged for a long time and is virtually silent.  Power Saving:It goes to sleep if not used for few minutes saving the charge! This mouse connects easily, no battery is needed it’s rechargable.
Note:
1.Definitely recommend having a moues pad with this mouse 2.The mouse charges with a unique usb cable, so be sure not to lose it! 3.It’s rechargable,no battery is needed. It goes to sleep if not used for few minutes saving the charge!
Product Details:
Type: Wireless Mouse DPI:1600 Size:3.55 * 2.77 * 1.15 inch Operation distance: up to 10 meters
features: CUTE DESIGN: The right and left click buttons are the eyes and it has a scroll wheel for the nose,good gift idea!
PORTABLE and COMFORTABLE: Small in size(3.54" * 2.76" * 1.14"),Fit your hand nice and comfortable,Designed specifically for female users or kids who have small hands
RECHARGEABLE: Built-in rechargeable lithium-ion battery,Its standard charge takes 4 hours, the longest charge time is less than or equal to 8 hours.The average charge every three days
QUIET: No loud clicking even in the library or open office!
Offer One year warranty

title: 【Upgrade】 LED Wireless Mouse, Rechargeable Slim Silent Mouse 2.4G Portable Mobile Optical Office Mouse with USB & Type-c Receiver, 3 Adjustable DPI for Notebook, PC, Laptop, Computer, Desktop (White)
features: 【LED Design】The upgraded version mouse with the LED lights adds more fun to the boring office life. The bottom of the mouse has a switch, you can switch lights freely. Low-key or sparkle, switch in one second, suitable for any occasion.

【Rechargeable Optical Mouse】Built-in durable rechargeable battery, it can be easily charged using the included USB cable without replacing the battery. Just 2 hours charging, you can use it about 7-15 days. Standby time is very long, energy-saving features, automatic sleep mode and wake-up mode are installed to save energy. Turn off the mouse LED light when not in use to save power.

【Plug and Play】No need to install any driver, just plug the USB receiver into your laptop will the mouse start to serve. 2.4GHz wireless technology provides powerful and reliable connection, effective up to 10 meters of range. Advanced optical tracking technology with fast click and responsiveness. 3-Level adjustable DPI (800/1200/1600 DPI), freely to satisfy daily work. Equipped with USB-C to USB adapter, let you worry-free use of any device.

【Mute Click & Comfortable Hand-feeling】Silent click Mouse with classic design with anti-fingerprint finish offers your hand maximum support and comfort. Silent button reduces 90% noises, which makes it an ideal wireless mouse for office, conference room, cafe, library, bedroom, help you concentrate on your work, study without disturbing others besides you. Ultra-thin, ergonomic design, lightweight and convenient for carrying or traveling.

【Wide Compatibility】Well compatible with Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, and 10 / Windows Vista / Windows Vista/ Windows ME etc, Fits for desktop, laptop, PC, Macbook and other devices. Please Note: If your laptop just with type-c port, You need connect the supplied USB-C to USB adapter to your laptop and plug the USB receiver in to it.

title: elec Space Wireless Mouse，Cool Sport Car Shape Computer Wireless Mouse Optical Cordless Mice with USB Receiver for PC Laptop 1600 DPI 3 Buttons Black
description:
Cool sport car shaped wireless mouse for laptop computer notebook,eyecatching ergonomic design,good choice as gifts for both kids and adults. Mini Receiver can be contained into the mouse and easy to carry.Light weight enough to take it everywhere. Uses 2.4Ghz wireless optical technology, transmission up to 10 metres operating distance. Plug and play, no need any drive, works on most surfaces smoothly Support most operating system, Windows 98 / ME / NT / 2000 / XP / Vista / Win 7 / Linux or Mac OS. With cool design and comfortable hand feeling,this wireless mouse give you special experience in using it.   Powered by 2 * AAA battery (Not Included),Dimension:4.4(L)*1.42(H)*2.16(W)inch,Net weight: 2.12 oz,1600 DPI,3 Buttons.   Switch Life: 5 million cycles,Automatically Power saving sleeping function.
How to use:
1.Please slide the top cover backwards,then you can see the USB receiver and battery slot;When using it, it is best to plug the USB receiver into the computer first and then install the battery to turn the switch on. Prepare 2* AAA battery when you first use it(not included);Turn on the switch,use on mouse pad,the mouse and receiver will connect automatically in a few seconds. 2.If not connect,please turn off the mouse switch,pull down the USB receiver,then plug the USB receiver and turn on the mouse switch again, press the 3 buttons(left button,right button,scroll wheel) together at same time for about 3-5 seconds.
Notes:
Cute design with LED headlight,the headlight is formed only because of light transmission,sometimes it hides inside that you cannot see it,this won't affect use. The light is not strong,this could save battery power.
Package Included:
1 x Wireless mouse 1 x USB receiver (placed inside the top cover) 1 x Using instruction
features: Wireless usb computer mouse with headlight and fashion sport car design, cool gaming mouse for laptop computer,good choice for using or as Christmas gifts for kids,women,men.
Powered by 2*AAA battery(Not included),Size: 4.4*2.16*1.42 inch,Net weight: 2.12 oz,1600 DPI,3 Buttons (Push the top cover,then you can see the USB receiver and battery slot inside).
Plug and Play, no any drive is needed;Power-saving sleeping function,if the mouse is not used for short time, it will turn to power saving mode to save energy.
2.4GHz wireless digital transmission technology, operation distance is up to 10 meters; Package Included:1 x Wireless mouse1 x USB receiver (placed inside the top cover)1 x Using instruction.
Support most operating system, Windows 98 / ME / NT / 2000 / XP / Vista / Win 7 / Linux or Mac OS and more.

features: 【Easy to Support 3 Device 】Rapoo Bluetooth 3.0, 4.0 Wireless 2.4G technology wireless mouse support 3 devices, two devices by Bluetooth and the third through 2.4GHz USB dongle. With one mouse, you can switch devide easily by simple button. Please note you cannot control three devices at the same time.

【Silent Design】 This silent wireless mouse features 90% noise reduction. Quiet clicks eliminate your worry of bothering others and allow you to better focus on your work. Enjoy peace and quiet during your browsing and working experiences. Anti finger-print and sweat proof outer shell, breathable and moisture absorbing, fresh and cool. Suit for Laptop/Desktop/MacBook/NoteBook/ChromeBook.

【Ergonomic & High Precision Optical】Symmetrical shape designed for left or right hand, flat radian fits the curve of the hand. Fatigue release, suitable for all day use. High precision optical engine, without a mouse pad using the mouse on various surfaces like leather, cloth, paper, desk, wood or resin.

【Convenient & extended battery life】 Rapoo implements low-power technology and a power-saving design with power switches to extend battery life, 9 months battery life under normal conditions. Portable compact size, easy to carry on for office and business trips or travel.

【One year Warranty & 30days Return】 We are the designer and manufacturer for Rapoo mouse and keyboards, we have been engaged to providing the best products to our customers. All the products are hassle-free 30days return and refund or replacement and one year Warranty.

reviews.title: Too cute!
reviews.text: Turned out the same color as I saw on my screen when I ordered it!!! So excited it matched the mouse pad I ordered too! Love it, works perfectly!

reviews.title: Works well, when it connects.  Update:  It loses connection WAY too much
reviews.text:
I like the mouse. Excellent value for money, except for one very annoying flaw. It is constantly disconnecting the bluetooth connection from my new Macbook Pro. It's pretty annoying.

After what feels like only a few minutes of idle time, the mouse bluetoothe disconnects. Then when I move it nothing happens for a couple seconds. The finally, it connects and my laptop tells me the mouse is back, and it works perfectly... until the next time it is idle.

I have use other low cost brands as well as my Apple Magic Mouse (which I don't use as I prefer a track wheel). I have not had any issues with the Bluetooth on those, only this one...

If it were not for the disconnect issue I would rate the mouse a 5 star. Otherwise, I give it a 3. I am still using it for now, but will find a better one...

UPDATE: Okay, I find that I am CONSTANTLY drustrated that this mouse loses connection with my laptop. PITA. Not worth using at any price.

reviews.title: Junk
reviews.text: Even after swapping out the battery, and making sure it’s in pairing mode, it refuses to pair with any device I’ve tried and doesn’t show up in my Bluetooth menu as a visible device. It very briefly showed up on my Macbook as a keyboard, but never as a mouse, and now it won’t even do that. Save your money and get a mouse that will work.

reviews.title: Very Nice
reviews.text:
Very nice. Looks good, I like the gold edging more than I thought I would. A little small, but I barely notice. The mouse I WAS using was HUGE, and my entire palm rested on it. This one only covers ⅔ of my palm.

Very comfortable.

Have not played anything that could be considered a stress test. I like that you can turn it off, but I dislike that you have to remember to turn it off.

I cannot tell if it goes to sleep.

reviews.title: wireless mouse
reviews.text: My old wireless finally died - dropped too many times onto the hardwood floor.  I purchased one that was like the old one and this one.  This one is flatter.  I ended up choosing to use this one.  It loaded quickly and is very comfortable to use.  Very, very quiet click - almost silent.  Having said all of this, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

reviews.title: Good value for the price
reviews.text: This is a good value for the cost.  If you need something small and easy to carry around with you this is great. Especially right now I am between working from home but sometimes have to visit the office and the less and smaller items I carry, the better!  This is nice and slim and works great with my laptop.  I don't really like to use batteries but as long as you switch it off when not in use you will be able to get quite a bit of use out of one.

reviews.title: Loses Connection CONSTANTLY
reviews.text: I have to turn it off and on about 5x a day because it randomly loses connectivity. When I am using it or idle for less than 1 min.

reviews.title: Good So Far
reviews.text: Easy to install.  Nice color. Has on off switch with usb inside by battery.

reviews.title: awesome mouse, awesome vendor!
reviews.text: mouse was delivered a little earlier than expected, which is great! corsair is a highly trusted brand and the last one we had, same model, lasted a good 3 years before the stroller wheel gave out. there probably is a way to just clean the wheel, but we just got a new mouse and intend on keeping the old one. it has extremely smooth dpi and motion with a nicely weighted feel. good solid unit!

reviews.title: Good FPS mouse
reviews.text: The materials wear really easily but it was perfect for my build and is light enough for the games I play, love the dpi buttons

reviews.title: double click problem after only 6 months
reviews.text: Bought this 6 months ago, now 6 months later I'm having this "double left click" problem. I thought this issue is rare, turned out it's extremely popular with this new Corsair mouse. My last 2 Corsair mice lasted 12 years, this one is garbage. Do not buy this unless you plan on doing RMA with Corsair while waiting 30 days for them to replace your mouse like I am right now. Extremely frustrating. If you don't believe me, search for all other corsair mice, they all have low 4 star reviews with double left click problems.

reviews.title: Laptop is not like new it is new the box had never been opened, Thank You So Much
reviews.text: I'm so happy with this purchase the items are exactly as described

reviews.title: Sucks, Slow, Terrible, Missing pieces.
reviews.text:
Extremely slow unless you know how to disable 50 or so features that run off the bat. The mouse came with no bluetooth adapter, and this doesn't have built in bluetooth.
Seriously don't buy HP.

1 hour of ownership update: It's stopped opening windows. It brings up the login screen, then I get a black screen. The computer no longer works and I've done nothing to it. There are several other reviews referring to this issue.

reviews.title: Five Stars
reviews.text: so far its a great buy. I like it

reviews.title: Excelent value laptop
reviews.text: My daughter needed a faster more copact laptop for her graphics software so we gave this one a try.  Very fast, easy setup...nice and easy to chuck the bloatware.  A reasonable price made it an easy choice...so much so that we purchased another.

reviews.title: Definitely returning and buying a different brand
reviews.text: I had high hopes for this laptop... very very very slow. I mean how can a company like HP in this day in age make a laptop this slow. I didn’t expect speeds you would see in a gaming laptop for this price but I at least want to be able to watch a movie or even start the laptop within 10 minutes, and they don’t even allow you to upgrade the RAM or anything from what I can tell... and the battery life is laughable, like a previous comment said, about 1 percent per minute. I would even go as far as to say that it dies faster than that. Purchased this for my sister for her birthday but will definitely return and go with a different laptop.

title: LED Bluetooth Mouse for Laptop iPad MacBook pro Wireless Mouse for Laptop MacBook Air Mac Chromebook
description: Packing list: Instructions x1, LED charging Bluetooth + 2.4G dual-mode wireless mouse x1, 2.4g Nano USB wireless receiver x1(hidden in the slot at the bottom of the mouse), USB charging line x1, USB C-type adapter x1, packing box x1, How to connect to a laptop using bluetooth mode:  Turn on the Bluetooth switch at the bottom of the mouse > open the computer system Settings > open Bluetooth >when the computer bluetooth display is looking for nearby bluetooth devices, find the "BT5.1 mouse", click the connection, and then successfully connected, you can use the mouse. How to connect to iPad Pro/iPad Air/ Mini/ iPhone (ios 13/ios 14) via Bluetooth Mouse  first slide the button at the bottom of the mouse to the bluetooth " " position. ( bluetooth mode.) (1) open ipad Settings >Accessibility > Touch > AssistiveTouch > Click to open （An auxiliary dot will appear on the screen）(2) Go back to Settings > Click on the bluetooth > Click to open > BT 5.1 MOUSE > connect and Pair.（PIN:0000)  🔋How to Charge Wireless Mouse? 🔋When the pointer of your mouse does not move or cannot be used, or suddenly disconnects continuously in use, you need to charge it for about 3 hours. Please use the USB port of your computer to charge it, or use an adapter with an output of no more than 5v to charge it
features: 🖱💻🖥📱BEST COMPATIBLE BLUETOOTH 5.1 CHIP: Compatible with more than 99.8% Bluetooth devices. This bluetooth mouse is suitable for all laptops with bluetooth function or ipad iPhone with iOS13 or above
💡 7-color LED mouse: After the mouse is successfully connected to your computer/laptop/iPad device, the 7-color LED starts to light one by one.
✅BUILT-IN BATTERY: Built-in battery,easy to charge by micro usb cable,no more need for extra AAA battery.please please keep the mouse power switch in "ON" position when charging .

✅ERGONOMIC DESIGN： Good surface coating technology given you a skin-like touch feeling. User-friendly design provide all-day comfort for work and entertainment, portable and pocket-sized perfect for travel, Mute design keeps away annoying clicks.

✅AUTO ENERGY-SAVINGSLEEPING MODE: Li-polymer batteries,high cycle life.the Auto Switch Off function will help you save energy as your bluetooth mouse will switch off when your PC is turned off or the receiver is disconnected. If you do not use the mouse for eight minutes, it will go to sleeping mode, you can press the any button to weak it up.

reviews.title: Bad product
reviews.text: It worked for a bit and then it just wouldn’t move ni matter if I charged it. Not happy

reviews.title: Lightweight and smooth.
reviews.text: Clicks easily and slides on mouse pad smoothly. A bit frustrating that it goes into sleep mode after a short time when I’m busy elsewhere but ease of use makes it okay. You need to be careful putting in the charger since the mouse is lightweight. And I love the pink color!

reviews.title: I like it
reviews.text: I like most of things to be wireless, and I really like this mouse because I have yet to have an issue with the bluetooth connection. I will say that you do have to push a bit harder to click the mouse than I am normally used to, but it's negligible and ultimately didn't bother me. I like the lights on it, and the side of the mouse works great for me (although it's a bit small for someone with big hands). I would buy again.

reviews.title: Goes to sleep when you need it the most
reviews.text: Won't stay connected to my laptop and goes to sleep.  Have to power cycle to get it to work again.  Even tried leaving the USB cable plugged in and it still goes to sleep.

reviews.title: Looks expensive but feels cheap
reviews.text:
The included USB charging line does not fit snug. Feels like an aftermarket adapter and felt as if the mouse would break is pushed all the way in or pulled out. Time will tell if the charging line lasts. I'll update as time goes on.

It has the feel of a toy but the girls in the house are already asking for one like it, so pretty sells. Color is towards the green scale but works well with seafoam colors.

title: LOGI Pebble M350 Portable Wireless Mouse with Bluetooth or 2.4 GHz Receiver, Silent, Slim Computer Mouse with Quiet Click for Laptop, Notebook, PC and Mac - Graphite - Asian Version
description: Own your space with Logitech Portable Wireless Mouse M350 – a modern, slim, and silent portable mouse designed for your curated lifestyle. Make a statement with this slim mouse that can easily be scooped up and brought to the cafe or library. Silent clicking and scrolling means you can stay focused without disturbing those around you. And the Portable Wireless Mouse M350 stays powered for 18-months on a single AA battery so you don’t have to worry about losing power. Connect the Portable Mouse M350 the way you want – via either Bluetooth or the USB receiver. The high-precision optical tracking works on most surfaces. Battery life may vary based on user and computing conditions

reviews.title: Cute item but it doesn't stay connected.
reviews.text:
Super cute item! It took me a while to get use to the small click space and it tracks well but the main issues is the USB isn't reliable. Anytime I put the laptop to sleep or I don't use the mouse for a while I have to unplug the USB and turn the mouse on/off. It is really inconvenient but my return wind has closed to exchange it.

Looks are a 10 and functionality is a 2 because it does not work as intended.

reviews.title: low quality
reviews.text: I received a replacement for the first one that would shut off and on constantly. The 2nd one worked for about a week and then stopped. When trying to remove the USB connector from my laptop it cam apart. Part of it got stuck in the USB port. It took over 5 minutes to pull the rest of it out with tweezers! I returned it for a refund. This is a low quality piece of junk. Do not buy.

reviews.title: Cheap- don’t buy it!
reviews.text: This mouse works some of the time... very cute but unreliable. For the return process, I had to pack and ship on my own. It cost half the price of the mouse to return.

reviews.title: Cutest thing ever
reviews.text: So adorable! It moves super smoothly and I love the color. It is wider than most mice I'd say, but not by much. It still feels natural and easy to use. The buttons are easy to use as well. My only concern is that when I have to wake my computer up from sleep mood, I really have to shake it. But that may be my sensitivity settings, but they were just fine with my previous mouse. Either way, this is super cute and I love it!

reviews.title: DESTROYS PORTS! DO NOT BUY!
reviews.text: The first one died after 2 hours. It damaged the port on one side of my laptop. The replacement did the same thing to the other side. I now have no functioning ports - can’t use another mouse or flash drives. This company owes me a new laptop!!!!

reviews.title: It works great! But not for long!
reviews.text:
Came a day early, put two AAA batteries in, put the USB in the laptop, and away we go.

It works great.

Update: It didn't work for long. It starts out with the mouse going to sleep all on it's own, and then it gets worst (you wouldn't think it possible, would you). I left the laptop and mouse on while I ran to the store, when I came back it was working VERY intermittent (very jerky) so I opened it thinking maybe my batteries weren't all that good.

What did I find? One of the batteries was so hot I couldn't touch it. I'm surprised it didn't catch on fire.

I should have known better than to buy some Chinese garbage. Into the trash it went.

Don't buy this, it's a waste of good money.

reviews.title: GREAT BUY!
reviews.text:
I had purchased an ergonomic mouse prior to this one. It was rechargeable as well and died less than an hour after lite use. It was not very comfortable and felt cheap. When i received this one I was skeptical because it did feel lite weight and I worried it would be cheap quality. It is comfortable & light weight, rechargeable long lasting charge. I use it for work it lasts all day and since I work from home I used it at night as well without needing a recharge until bed time. I have switched to regular mouse a couple times when i forgot to charge mine and there is a huge difference in comfort. I have a hand injury and when i use a regular mouse my hand hurts, after using this one I see a big difference when I have had to switch back. Highly recommend.

** update: i’ve now had this for several months and I have actually ordered another one which I haven’t had to take out of the box. I honestly ordered it because I lost the charging cord to my first one which I rarely use. I think I charge this mouse maybe once a week if that and I use it up to 15 hours a day with work and it never dies.

reviews.title: Love this mouse!
reviews.text: This is the 3rd one so I can have 2 at work in case I forget to charge it I have a backup and 1 at home.  The buttons aren't as quiet on this one and it's not that pretty shiny purple as pictured but if you're an Admin Asst like me you will love it! It took away my shoulder and wrist pain.

reviews.title: Great for carpal tunnel!
reviews.text: I bought this mouse for its ergonomically design. It is great for my carpal tunnel. Sleep mode is fantastic and it’s easy to charge, which it does quickly.

title: Microsoft Wireless Mouse 5000
description:
Product Description
World’s Most Advanced Tracking — Go More Places Than Optical or Laser. The Microsoft Wireless Mouse 5000, with revolutionary BlueTrack Technology, works more places than ever before, including on granite countertops, carpets — even on a wood table or a rough, unfinished park bench.
From the Manufacturer
Microsoft Wireless Mouse 5000
Comfortable shape
World's Most Advanced Tracking - Go More Places Than Optical or Laser
The Microsoft Wireless Mouse 5000, with revolutionary BlueTrack Technology, works more places than ever before, including on granite countertops, carpets - even on a wood table or a rough, unfinished park bench.
BlueTrack Technology
Comfort for Either Hand
Work anywhere with the world's most advanced tracking.
Comfort and durability
Modern design and premium finish provides comfort for either hand. Symmetrical shape and unique rubber grips give you control and cushioning.
Snap in and Go
Simply snap in the transceiver for convenient on-the-go storage.
Reliable Wireless
Microsoft 2.4 ghz wireless delivers a reliable connection with up to a 30-foot range.
8-Month Battery Life
Use your mouse without power interruption for up to 8 months. The snap-in transceiver automatically turns the mouse on and off, and the led battery status indicator lets you know when replacement is needed.
What is BlueTrack?
BlueTrack Technology works on more surfaces than both optical and laser mice. It uses high-angle imaging optics to generate an accurate picture of the surface.
System Requirements
Windows 7, Windows Vista, Windows XP (excluding Windows XP 64-bit)
Windows 7, Windows Vista, Windows XP (excluding Windows XP 64-bit)
100 MB
100 MB
2 AA alkaline included
2 AA alkaline included

reviews.text: The Logitech M325 is pretty much the standard wireless mouse that so many people have. The color pattern is nice and vibrant, and it's a cheap buy.

reviews.title: Five Stars
reviews.text: Great colors and my daughter loved it
